message:
chore(writing/slack-mattermost): de-slopify pass 2 — trim redundant prose, add SKILL CATALOG CALLOUTS section, restructure body into tighter sections

Continuation of the prior `de-slopify the whole article` pass.
Net change is large (~+122 / -2383 lines) and dominated by
deletions, but no file is removed and no feature is lost — the
deleted prose is either:

  1. Now lives in `public/slack-mattermost-migration-guide.md`
     (the standalone reference guide added in
     `feat(writing/slack-mattermost): expand article + ship
     downloadable guide`), and was kept in the article only as
     duplicated narrative.
  2. Was AI-overwritten "Why now" / "what was new and painful" /
     "the specific pair of skills" preamble that the de-slopify
     pass converted into a single tight intro paragraph with the
     hero illustration carrying the rhetorical weight.
  3. Was the §11.x manual jsm install workaround — relocated
     into a downloadable-guide appendix once jsm install became
     reliable enough not to need a manual fallback in the public
     article.

NEW section: SKILL CATALOG CALLOUTS
  Promotes the three skill catalog URLs (phase-1-extraction,
  phase-2-setup-and-import, phase-3-ongoing-mattermost-maintenance)
  into a top-of-article callout block with the gradient-bordered
  card style used elsewhere in the article.  Open-in-new-tab
  links match the styling used by the prior link list and now
  appear above the fold so readers can jump directly to the
  catalog without scrolling through the whole article.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
